productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Skinny Fit Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed and creased look made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two insert pockets, contrast stitch detailing, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, embroidered branding on the front pocket and metal button and zipper closure on the front. Fit Skinny fit; Regular rise Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with its heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from deni yo, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. This pair stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressier look. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
